microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized, self-service system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 deployment** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil by 30% and made drill execution scalable across partner integrations.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering the program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects previously invisible to the platform.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured cross-org workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — a direct application of LLM-powered tooling to operational problems.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility with zero incident escalations.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-powered product adoption** across 14 Azure engineering teams by running hands-on demos and training for LLM-based code generation workflows, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and validating customer-first rollout strategy.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ customer interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the addition of intent-based YAML generation to the platform backlog.

Improved retrieval quality and **cut lookup time by 83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool and enforcing metadata standards — an early application of RAG-style infrastructure to internal tooling.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Identified **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch through discovery with 20+ service teams, then built a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths — directly reducing customer-facing delays.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments across the region launch pipeline.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ robotics stations.
Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead.
Resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-team delivery.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, cutting scoping and invoicing cycle time and improving customer response speed.
Reduced **customer acquisition cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% through a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website, Google profile, and paid channels.
Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering a profitability model that informed future job scoping and resource allocation.
